audit_notes: Audited 3 leaves: (1) section '10-05 システムの信頼性' → 'System Reliability' / '系统的可靠性' clean. (2) MTBF term — definition correctly conveys 'average time between failures', formula '稼働時間の合計÷故障の回数' preserved as '运行时间总和÷故障次数' / 'Total operating time ÷ Number of failures'. (3) figure caption 'MTBF（平均故障間隔）' rendered consistently with the surface. Acronym MTBF preserved. No choice markers.
